title: fraxinus stylosa
intro: Fraxinus stylosa, commonly known as the flowering ash, is a type of deciduous tree native to parts of Asia and Australia. The bark and leaves of Fraxinus stylosa have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus stylosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Fraxinus stylosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
